description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named E.V.E CI that runs on push to all branches except main and on pull requests to main. The workflow has concurrent execution with cancel-in-progress set to true, grouped by environment and reference. It consists of three jobs: specials, mainline, and supplemental, each running on self-hosted or ubuntu-latest environments with different strategies and matrices of compiler, architecture, and options. Each job checks out the code, runs tests or docker actions with specific options, and performs cleanup.
